query: SELECT us.id, us.userId, us.stageId, us.status, s.name FROM user_stages us LEFT JOIN stages s ON us.stageId = s.id WHERE s.id IS NULL LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3GB82FZGmc2ADuw.a7b90b108d57 --database jiPvNqaHRUg9H2uZgXUx3J --execute SELECT us.id, us.userId, us.stageId, us.status, s.name FROM user_stages us LEFT JOIN stages s ON us.stageId = s.id WHERE s.id IS NULL LIMIT 20;
